case_title: STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ERICH BIELEK et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BIELEK, ERICH SCHNOBER, DANIEL A DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-25-2010

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAR-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNOBER, DANIEL A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST HOWARD D. MYERS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-30-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-15-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAR-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIELEK, ERICH

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2010 CONTINUED TO JUN-30-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-28-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-30-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2010 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
